Direct Investment by Country and Industry, 2023
U.S. direct investment abroad position, or cumulative level of investment, increased $364.0 billion to $6.68 trillion at the end of 2023
foreign direct investment in the United States position increased $227.0 billion to $5.39 trillion
U.S. multinational enterprises (MNEs) invest in nearly every country
The Netherlands was the top investing country with a position of $717.5 billion
Foreign MNEs earned income of $268.6 billion in 2023 on their cumulative investment in the United States
or a significant degree of influence on the management of an enterprise resident in another economy
